battleTraits.name: Light of the Bad Moon
battleTraits.description: Friendly units in your territory add +1 to Save rolls. Friendly units in enemy territory add +1 to Wound rolls.

regimentAbilities.name: I'm Da Boss
regimentAbilities.description: Pick a friendly unit. Either return D3 slain models OR add +1 to Hit rolls until next turn.

regimentAbilities.name: Netters
regimentAbilities.description: Pick an enemy unit in combat. That unit subtracts 1 from Hit rolls until end of turn.
